docs: Creates a new BeliNFT collection
constructors.label: new

docs: # BeliNFT - PSP34 Compliant NFT Contract
The official NFT contract for BelizeChain.
Implements the PSP34 standard (Polkadot's ERC721 equivalent).
## Features
- PSP34 standard compliance (mint, transfer, burn, approve)
- Metadata support (token URI, attributes)
- Collection management
- Approval system (per-token and operator)
## Use Cases
- Digital art collections
- Land title NFTs (BelizeChain Land Ledger)
- Identity documents
- Gaming assets
- Membership tokens
## Design Notes
- Uses a simple single-owner model rather than the `access_control` library.
This is intentional: a single `owner` role is sufficient for mint/admin gating.
Multi-role governance can integrate via the companion `access_control` contract.
Event emitted when a token is transferred
events.label: Transfer

docs: Event emitted when a token is approved
events.label: Approval

docs: Event emitted when an operator is approved
events.label: ApprovalForAll

docs: Event emitted when token metadata is updated
events.label: MetadataUpdate

docs: Event emitted when contract ownership is transferred
events.label: OwnershipTransferred

docs: Event emitted when the contract code hash is updated
events.label: CodeHashUpdated

docs: Returns the collection name
messages.label: collection_name

docs: Returns the collection symbol
messages.label: collection_symbol

docs: Returns a unique identifier for this NFT collection (PSP34 standard)
messages.label: collection_id

docs: Returns the total supply of tokens
messages.label: total_supply

docs: Returns the owner of a token (PSP34 standard)
messages.label: owner_of

docs: Returns the balance of an account
messages.label: balance_of

docs: Returns the approved address for a token
messages.label: get_approved

docs: Returns whether an operator is approved for all tokens of an owner
messages.label: is_approved_for_all

docs: Checks approval status (PSP34 standard)
- `id: Some(Id)` — checks per-token approval
- `id: None` — checks operator-level approval
messages.label: allowance

docs: Returns the metadata URI for a token
messages.label: token_uri

docs: Returns a token attribute by key (PSP34Metadata standard)
Supported keys: `b"uri"` (returns the token URI)
messages.label: get_attribute

docs: Mints a new token (owner only)
messages.label: mint

docs: Transfers a token (PSP34 standard)
messages.label: transfer

docs: Transfers a token from one account to another
messages.label: transfer_from

docs: Approves an operator for a specific token or all tokens (PSP34 standard)
- `id: Some(Id)` — per-token approval (grant or revoke)
- `id: None` — operator-level approval for all tokens
**Note:** Per-token approvals and operator-level approvals are independent
systems per the PSP34 specification. Revoking an operator does not clear
existing per-token approvals, and vice versa.
messages.label: approve

docs: Sets or unsets the approval of an operator (convenience wrapper)
messages.label: set_approval_for_all

docs: Burns a token (owner only)
messages.label: burn

docs: Updates the URI of a token (owner only)
messages.label: set_token_uri

docs: Proposes a new owner for the contract (two-step transfer)
The proposed owner must call `accept_ownership()` to complete the transfer.
messages.label: propose_ownership

docs: Accepts a pending ownership transfer (must be called by the proposed owner)
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Returns the contract owner
messages.label: contract_owner

docs: Returns the pending owner (if any)
messages.label: pending_owner

docs: Returns the maximum supply cap (None = unlimited)
messages.label: max_supply

docs: Sets the maximum supply cap (owner only, None = unlimited)
messages.label: set_max_supply

docs: Upgrades the contract code hash (owner only)
Allows the contract to be upgraded to a new implementation
while preserving storage state.
messages.label: set_code_hash
